ideation: This sequence mimics the shape of the number 5 using the robot's arms.  The animation will emphasize the distinct parts of the number 5.  The movement will be deliberate and precise, reflecting the structured nature of the numeral. Frame 1 will start with the arms at the sides. Frame 2 will raise the left arm to represent the vertical part of the 5. Frame 3 will bring in the right arm to form the diagonal part of the 5. Frame 4 will adjust the angles slightly to refine the 5 shape. Frame 5 will show the final pose of a clear number 5.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to form
left arm rises to create the vertical stroke
right arm extends diagonally, forming the top bar
arms adjust to refine the numeral shape
the number five is clearly formed by the arms
